sidebar.permissionConfigHint: Permissions are controlled by user roles in User Management. Click to open.

permissionConfig.title: Permissions
permissionConfig.subtitle: View role-to-capability mapping. Actual permissions are set via User Management roles.
permissionConfig.howToChangeDesc: Permissions are controlled by each user's role in User Management. Go to User Management, set role (Admin / Manager / Operator / Viewer / User) per user, then save.
permissionConfig.roleAdminDesc: Full access: stores, analysis, tools, user management, workflow, LLM config, feedback.
permissionConfig.roleManagerDesc: Same as Admin: full access including user management and workflow.
permissionConfig.roleOperatorDesc: Stores, analysis, tools, profile; no user management or workflow.

dashboard.title: Store Management
dashboard.subtitle: Configure stores, regions, and upload latest data
dashboard.clickToCreate: Click above to create your first store
dashboard.selectStoreHint: Please select a store from the left sidebar
dashboard.howToImport: How to import: Select a TikTok/Douyin store, click 'Import Data' to upload Excel, then view stats on dashboard.
dashboard.lackOfData: Lack of sufficient data to provide trend
dashboard.comparisonPeriodHint: Sequential comparison: current period vs previous period of same length
dashboard.atLeastOneMetric: At least keep one data metric
dashboard.selectAtLeastOneInFilter: Select at least one data metric (toggle in filter panel)

tasks.taskListDescription: Tasks will be created from your operational data
tasks.translatePleaseWait: Translation in progress, do not click again
tasks.translateTimeout: Translation timed out. Retry later or reduce task count.
tasks.quotaExceeded: Daily free translation limit reached. Tasks will show in original language. Try again tomorrow or switch to Chinese.
tasks.alreadyTranslated: All tasks already translated to current language
tasks.footerTip: Tasks are auto-generated from operational data. When LLM is configured, AI suggestions are prioritized; otherwise rule templates are used. Click "Smart Generate" to refresh.
tasks.ruleLlmHint: Currently rule tasks only (LLM 0). Configure script LLM and click "Smart Generate"; if still 0, go to
tasks.ruleLlmHintAfter: to check or see backend logs.
tasks.dataSourceSelectTitle: When current store has no data, use another store for generation (tasks still belong to current store)

analysis.title: Data Analysis & Diagnosis
analysis.subtitle: Store data analysis, comparison and diagnosis
analysis.selectStoreHintAnalysis: Select a store above to analyze
analysis.storeCompareDesc: Select multiple stores for data comparison
analysis.lowConversionContent: Current conversion rate is {{rate}}, below industry avg 3.5%. Optimize live script, add interactions, improve product display. Estimated +3% conversion, +{{orders}} orders.
analysis.lowDurationContent: This week total live duration {{duration}}. Recommend 30+ hours. Each extra hour may add GMV {{gmv}}.
analysis.lowInteractionContent: Current interaction rate {{rate}}%. Add giveaways, Q&A. Estimated +15% watch time, +0.5% conversion.

tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: AI tools, script generation, replay analysis, report
tools.selectStoreHint: Select a store above to continue
tools.operatorFeaturesDesc: Use script generation, live replay analysis, reports, market analysis and all tools to improve live performance.
tools.operatorFeaturesStatus: Available now: Script generation (this page). Report, market analysis, live replay analysis, recommendations, etc. are being connected; use the buttons above to try — if you see "Feature not yet available", that tool is not yet open.
tools.screenRecordingDesc: Upload live replay materials for analysis and brand strategy
tools.reportDesc: Generate period report from store data
tools.marketAnalysisDesc: Enter category and time range for market trends
tools.recommendationsDesc: Generate product recommendations by store and category
tools.statsDesc: Pull and summarize store data for selected period
tools.speechDesc: Enter product and audience for live script generation
tools.compareDesc: Compare GMV, duration, etc. across 2+ stores
tools.assistantDesc: View and handle current store tasks
tools.scriptHint: Fill in product info, select script type and language to generate
tools.scriptHintOther: Click the button below to generate
tools.productSkuHint: If filled, the script will reference this SKU so viewers can order the right item
tools.productFeaturesPlaceholder: e.g.: Safe, durable, easy to clean
tools.promoPlaceholder: Paste key info: stock, countdown, gifts, limited price…
tools.selectStoreForScript: Please select a store first for script generation
tools.mediaLibraryDesc: Uploaded materials can be used as baseline data for analysis and brand strategy.
tools.scriptDisclaimerWithStore: Content above is generated from the selected store's category, audience and recent data. For reference only.
tools.scriptDisclaimerDefault: Content above is generated by the system from current data. For reference only.
tools.translationFailed: Translation failed or timed out. Click "Translate" below to retry.
tools.translation404Hint: Translation API not found (404). Please restart the backend server (e.g. npm run dev in backend folder).
tools.scriptTranslationSkipped: Auto-translation to the current language was not applied; content below is in the original language. To get script in English or another language, switch the interface language and generate again.
tools.selectStoreFirstForScript: Please select a store first to generate script based on store data
tools.templateFallbackHint: This is template script (LLM did not return or call failed). Check LLM calling method and API config.

messageCenter.title: Messages
messageCenter.subtitle: Version updates, feedback replies, and system notifications

stats.avgWatchDurationTooltip: Total live duration (min) ÷ viewers, reflects engagement
stats.timelinessTooltip: GMV per hour = GMV ÷ live duration

feedback.submitIntro: Your opinion matters. Please tell us what you think.
feedback.contactHint: Leave contact if you want a reply.

feedbackManage.title: Feedback Management
feedbackManage.subtitle: View and manage user feedback
feedbackManage.replyPlaceholder: Enter your reply (stored with this feedback)
feedbackManage.confirmDelete: Delete this feedback? This cannot be undone.

createStore.title: Create Store
createStore.subtitle: Create a new live-commerce store (reference: Douyin/Shopee seller center)
createStore.countryHint: Default: China; search supported; China & Southeast Asia available
createStore.level1LoadFailed: Level 1 categories failed to load. Ensure backend is running.
createStore.level1NoData: No category data. Run DB reset script and refresh, or ensure backend is running.
createStore.level2NoLevel3Hint: {{count}} level-2 item(s) have no level-3; they will be added
createStore.level2OnlyHint: No level-3 under this level-1; you can add selected level-2 directly
createStore.categoriesHint: Select level 1 (e.g. apparel, beauty, food), then check level 2 & 3, then click «Add selected»
createStore.brandPositioningHint: Confirm or adjust in «Pending tasks» after creation
createStore.brandStrategyHint: Brand strategy will be generated in «Pending tasks»
createStore.pleaseSelectCategories: Select level-3 categories or level-2 with no level-3
createStore.categoriesSelected: {{count}} categories selected; will be saved with the store

admin.title: User Management
admin.subtitle: Manage users and permissions
admin.llmConfigDesc: This config is used by all LLM features (smart tasks, script, analysis, etc.). Supports Coze, Doubao, OpenAI. Saved to DB; only admins can edit.
admin.llmUsersPermissionHint: Select users who can use LLM below; select all to apply to everyone.
admin.llmConfiguredHint: Configured; only selected users can use LLM.
admin.apiUrlHint: Default Coze; can switch to Doubao, OpenAI, etc.
admin.apiKeyPlaceholder: Coze: API Token; Doubao/OpenAI: Console API Key
admin.modelPlaceholder: Coze: not needed; Doubao: ep- endpoint ID; OpenAI: optional
admin.featureMappingDesc: Assign which LLM tool each feature uses; unset uses script config or default tool.
admin.savePermissionsOnlyHint: Save user/feature selection only, no API key needed
admin.llmConfigSavedAllUsers: LLM config saved; it applies to all users.
admin.llmConfigSavedSelected: LLM config saved; only selected users can use it.
admin.copyUserId: Copy user ID (e.g. for permission check)
admin.error403: No permission. Only admin or manager can access user management. Please confirm your role.
admin.errorLoadUsers: Failed to load user list. Please try again later.
